findings.evidence: `rg -n "ofFinsetWithMultiplicity_mem_effectiveSubmonoid|/--" code/TauCeti/AlgebraicGeometry/WeilDivisor/FiniteSum.lean` shows only `@[simp]` immediately before the lemma at line 348.
findings.fix: Add a docstring describing that `ofFinsetWithMultiplicity s m` belongs to `effectiveSubmonoid X`.
findings.issue: The public theorem `ofFinsetWithMultiplicity_mem_effectiveSubmonoid` has no docstring despite being part of the exported finite-set multiplicity API.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "ofFinset_mem_effectiveSubmonoid|/--" code/TauCeti/AlgebraicGeometry/WeilDivisor/FiniteSum.lean` shows only `@[simp]` immediately before the lemma at line 550.
findings.fix: Add a docstring describing that `ofFinset s` belongs to `effectiveSubmonoid X`.
findings.issue: The public theorem `ofFinset_mem_effectiveSubmonoid` has no docstring despite being part of the exported coefficient-one finite-set divisor API.

summary: The new module docstring and constructor API documentation are mostly accurate, but two exported effective-submonoid membership lemmas are still undocumented.
